title: Hair Extension Models Needed in Fresno
author: Studio One Hair Design
body_text:
Studio One Hair Design seeks three local women aged 40-60 to become extension models for their newest specialist. Real women without professional modeling experience are encouraged to apply. Applicants should be comfortable with photography and video documentation for marketing materials.

Models receive "extensions at cost, which is typically a 40% discount from standard investment." The transformation will be featured across the salon's blog, Instagram, Facebook, and advertising campaigns.

Criteria include no major color corrections needed, willingness to be photographed and filmed with signed releases, and openness to fullness or length extensions.

Your story will be featured in blog posts, before/after social media content, and promotional ads showcasing the new stylist's work.

Only three spots are available. Applications reviewed in order received. Interested candidates should apply via the provided JotForm application link.
